visual_analysis: The visual quality of the interactive application is quite high, with a clean, organized layout that effectively highlights the algorithm's functionality. The use of color is limited but purposeful, enhancing clarity, while the typography is readable and well-suited for the content.
educational_analysis: The educational quality is excellent, as the interface clearly conveys the Bellman-Ford algorithm concept through interactive elements. Instructions are succinct and well-positioned, aiding users in grasping the steps of the algorithm while fostering engagement with the material.
